# PERF-193 negative: a reusable *time.Timer is reset on each iteration
lang: go
file: PERF-193-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "time"

func Poll(items []int) {
	t := time.NewTimer(time.Second)
	defer t.Stop()
	for range items {
		t.Reset(time.Second)
		<-t.C
		_ = tick()
	}
}

func tick() error { return nil }
